table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)

a.title: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.g. filler and placer ids.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node. Typically a URI reference to a document or message in a persistent store associated with the EHR.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)

a.title: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

a.title: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.td: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.

description.value: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

short.value: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

definition.value: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

short.value: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.

definition.value: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.g. filler and placer ids.

short.value: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

definition.value: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

short.value: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node.

definition.value: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node. Typically a URI reference to a document or message in a persistent store associated with the EHR.

short.value: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

definition.value: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

short.value: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.

definition.value: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.

short.value: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

definition.value: The `FEEDER_AUDIT` class defines the semantics of an audit trail which is constructed to describe the origin of data that have been transformed into openEHR form and committed to the system.

short.value: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.

definition.value: Identifiers used for the item in the originating system, e.g. filler and placer ids.

short.value: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

definition.value: Identifiers used for the item in the feeder system, where the feeder system is distinct from the originating system.

short.value: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node.

definition.value: Optional inline inclusion of or reference to original content corresponding to the openEHR content at this node. Typically a URI reference to a document or message in a persistent store associated with the EHR.

short.value: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

definition.value: Any audit information for the information item from the originating system.

short.value: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.

definition.value: Any audit information for the information item from the feeder system, if different from the originating system.
